title: Final review of epic 4bt diff
description:
Meta-work tick (orchestrator-owned). Review the full diff of epic 4bt (soft ordering: after field, CLI flags, ComputeRoadmap union layering, tk next soft-order sort) against its base branch.

Focus areas: (1) the hard/soft boundary — verify nothing in query.Ready or readiness predicates consults after; (2) consistency of after handling between ComputeRoadmap layering and the softorder sort (missing/closed-target semantics must match ready.go blocker semantics); (3) schema/struct/docs agreement on the field name and omitempty behavior.

Run a reviewer subagent per the skill (references/claude-runner.md, Reviewing the work). Resolve or route findings before the close-out tick unblocks.
acceptance_criteria: epic diff reviewed; all blocker-severity findings resolved or routed as ticks before close-out unblocks
